mnemonics.title: OSPF Layers
mnemonics.content: OSPF Offers Speedy Paths First (Dijkstra's algorithm for fast convergence)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine nodes as cities and link costs as road distances - always pick the shortest unexplored route

analogies.analogy: Like postal systems: RIP=local mail carriers, OSPF=express couriers within a company, BGP=international shipping
